title: lappula redowskii subsp. occidentalis
intro: Lappula redowskii subsp. occidentalis, also known as Western Sticktight, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Lappula redowskii subsp. occidentalis include soothing skin conditions, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a variety of skin issues and minor injuries.
